programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Sword of the Assassin
programme.desc: His family was wrongly executed by the empress of Vietnam after being framed – now he sets out for justice

programme.title: Closed for Storm
programme.desc: Closed For Storm is a film detailing the incredible history of a massive, American theme park that was eventually left completely abandoned

programme.title: Change Of Heart
programme.desc: Diane McCarthy produces a TV show for her arrogant ex-boyfriend, Jared. Diane would love to quit to focus on her successful blog but she can't afford to.

programme.title: When Duty Calls
programme.desc: When newlyweds, Ellie and Martin, both volunteer at their local police department they find themselves tangled in a criminal case.

programme.title: Lost in Love
programme.desc: Two tourists in Turkey get left behind by their tour bus after visiting an archaeological site. Without their belongings, they must make their way back to Istanbul, improvising along the way with meager means.

programme.title: Finding Love in Big Sky
programme.desc: An independent country girl, Paisley, takes on the task of upholding her adored grandfather's ranch. After being denied the funding needed to refurbish the ranch, she is reintroduced to her ex-boyfriend Josh, a big-time marketing executive stationed in Denver who has been suspended from his current position at his company. Admitting to herself that she needs the help, Paisley agrees to work with Josh while he is town to come up with ideas on how to raise money for the farm.

programme.title: Hope Ranch
programme.desc: A young girl has it all—a beautiful ranch, a horse named Faith, and the love of her family. But after the death of her military father, she and her mother are in danger of losing their family ranch too. With a little help from friends and their majestic white horse, they hatch a plan to raise enough money to save the ranch while learning to never lose hope, despite all odds.

programme.title: Heaven Is Waiting
programme.desc: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: Arizona Colt Returns
programme.desc: Famed gunman Arizona Colt is sent by Moreno to rescue his daughter from the grips of Arizona's old enemy, Keane. But certain complications make the mission far more dangerous than expected.

programme.title: Shango
programme.desc: Shango is a Texas Ranger who finds himself up against a former Confederate officer and his gang of thugs who have been terrorizing a local border town in search of gold.

programme.title: Something Big
programme.desc: A man kidnaps the wife of a cavalry commander in order to exchange her for a Gatling gun that's being sold by a gun runner.

programme.title: Seven Alone
programme.desc: A frontier family crosses the U.S. by wagon train, hoping for a better life in the Oregon Territory.

programme.title: Onegin
programme.desc: Eugene Onegin is a jaded and disaffected young man who leaves St. Petersburg unexpectedly when he inherits an estate from a wealthy uncle. Starring: Ralph Fiennes, Liv Tyler, Toby Stephens, Lena Headey, Simon McBurney, Jason Watkins

programme.title: Back To Love
programme.desc: A young widow returns home for the first time in three years to help prepare her sister's wedding. She is forced to confront her past, including the man she never expected to fall for.

programme.title: Couples Vacation
programme.desc: When Jack and Amanda head off on a glamping trip to "reignite their spark", their blissful romantic getaway is rudely hijacked and they are left in more trouble than before!

programme.title: Baking Up Love
programme.desc: CEO of the Morton Pumpkin Company decides to commemorate the anniversary of the cutest town ever founded with a bake-off. The town sweetheart is expected to win. When her niece is left to stay, winning seems out of reach.

programme.title: 4 Wedding Planners
programme.desc: When Lily goes home to Hawaii, she wants to help save her family's wedding planning business, even when her ex-boyfriend shows up as a new client.

programme.title: A Romance Wedding
programme.desc: Zoe Davis is a successful and highly driven wedding planner in the big city. When her father asks her for help at the family café shop, she happily drives back to her cozy hometown of Romance, Oregon. Little does she know her mom has already hired Will to help, an aspiring chef and coincidentally...Zoe's childhood sweetheart! Tensions rise between Zoe and Will, but so does the chemistry. Will they settle their differences and find lost love along the way?

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: After a big breakup, journalist Dana Willingham finds herself alone and stuck at a couple's yoga retreat while the biggest story of her career breaks far away. And she doesn't even like yoga! But maybe the universe has put her here for a reason, because the handsome loner staying at the lodge turns out to be Stefan Gonzales, the tech guru at the center of the scandal. As she gains his trust to expose him, she finds herself falling in love with him. Now she must use the lessons from yoga to choose: the perfect story or the perfect man?

programme.title: Love at Sunset Terrace
programme.desc: Tired of her fast-paced life in the city, Sophie Carter travels to a small seaside town to disconnect and self-reflect, staying at an Airbnb run by a widowed father of a young girl. With a little nudging from the matchmaking daughter, Sophie and Michael unexpectedly start to fall in love and Sophie must decide between returning home or following her heart.

programme.title: Baby Obsession
programme.desc: Anna Gray is pregnant and ready to start a family with her loving husband Jon. But she has no idea that Rachel, the mother of a baby who died from SIDS when Anna babysat her years ago, has been waiting for this day, determined to take back what Anna 'took from me'.

programme.title: The Lancaster Bomber
programme.desc: THE LANCASTER BOMBER is a documentary about one of history's most iconic aircrafts - the Lancaster bomber - and its instrumental role in the defeat of Nazi Germany.

programme.title: The Boat
programme.desc: Buster and his family go on a voyage on his homemade boat that proves to be one disaster after another.

programme.title: The Cabinet Of Dr. Caligari
programme.desc: The most brilliant example of that dark and twisted film movement known as German expressionism, The Cabinet of Dr. Caligari is a plunge into the mind of insanity that severs all ties with the rational world.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Chuck Scott gets a job as chauffeur to tough guy Eddie Roman but Chuck's involvement with Eddie's fearful wife becomes a nightmare.

programme.title: The Cortege
programme.desc: Capi is the oldest gravedigger in the cemetery. Used to working amidst the suffering of others and the jokes of his colleagues, there is only one person capable of taking him out of his daily routine. Every month for the last couple of years he has waited for Marta to take flowers to the grave of her husband. She is his last hope.

programme.title: The Devil's Liquor
programme.desc: Old man Eladio is dying. Throughout the last decades, he has lived alone, working in his old liquor factory. Modernity threatens his spirits business, but he refuses to abandon it. A visit by his oldest grandson will be the ideal moment to save the factor

programme.title: The Duke Is Tops
programme.desc: A theatrical producer puts aside his own success to boost the career of a talented singer.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: The story of the first major battle of the American phase of the Vietnam War, and the soldiers on both sides that fought it. Feat: Mel Gibson.

programme.title: Whip It
programme.desc: In Bodeen, Texas, an indie-rock loving misfit finds a way of dealing with her small-town misery after she discovers a roller derby league in nearby Austin.

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Eternity
programme.desc: Detective Richard Manning (played by Elliot Travers) is transported into a virtual-reality computer game and tasked with solving a seemingly implausible murder. The more Richard investigates, the more complex the case seems to become. He soon realizes his own future and survival depend on him solving everything - and quickly.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: Breaking Infinity is a time-bending thriller about a research scientist named Liam, who has become unstuck in time. The only people Liam can count on for help are the doctor treating him, Emma, who's convinced he's suffering from delusions and his lab assistant Garret. As Liam's episodes become more intense, and his jumps through time more extreme, Liam travels from the distant past where he's guided by a mysterious Old Man, to the future where he witnesses the end of the world - an apocalypse he may have caused.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: John Carpenter's pulp science fiction classic - this brilliantly clever and funny parody of Stanley Kubrick's 2001: A Space Odyssey, follows a warped intergalactic mission to blow up unstable planets. Four bored astronauts fill in time between missions catching up on their tans with the help of a sun-lamp, playing with a suspiciously plastic-looking alien mascot they are taking back to Earth and conversing with their female version of Hal. Things start to go horribly wrong when the spaceship computer misfires and a 'smart bomb' thinks it is God.

programme.title: Amber's Story
programme.desc: This is the true story of the kidnapping of Amber Hagerman and how her family came together to help other abducted children as a result of her tragedy which resulted in a new system to help find missing children - The Amber Alert.

programme.title: JK's House
programme.desc: At JK's House, Dr. Amber Jenkins (Robin Givens) and JK (Jakayla Lawrence) blend family values and life lessons with music and dance.

programme.title: The Suspect
programme.desc: Beth is wrongly accused of murdering her husband. With the help of an insurance investigator and her stepdaughter together they find the real killer.

programme.title: The Great New Wonderful
programme.desc: The Great New Wonderful weaves five stories against the backdrop of an anxious and uncertain post-9-11 New York City.

programme.title: Smooch
programme.desc: A rakishly handsome "English Royal" comes to America for an arranged marriage, and ends up being mugged in San Francisco's Golden Gate Park and left with amnesia.

programme.title: Results
programme.desc: Two mismatched personal trainers' lives are upended by the actions of a new, wealthy client.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: The Age of Innocence
programme.desc: Nominated for five Academy Awards® including a win for Best Costume Design, Martin Scorsese's 1993 adaptation of Edith Wharton's novel is set in the elegant milieu of the oldest and richest families in 1870s New York. Marriages are like treaties between nations, their purpose not to cement romance or produce children, but to provide for the orderly transmission of wealth between the generations.

programme.title: I Could Never Be Your Woman
programme.desc: Rosie, a smart, successful single mom refuses to accept that life has passed her by just because she's turned 40. Then talented young actor Adam walks into her life and straight into her heart. Finally, Rosie seems to have met the right, but much younger, man. But is this just one more time she'll have to say I could never be your woman? An upbeat and acerbic romantic comedy directed by Amy Heckerling, featuring stellar cast: Michelle Pfeiffer, Paul Rudd, Saoirse Ronan, Jon Lovitz, Stacey Dash, Fred Willard, Sarah Alexander, Tracey Ullman, Henry Winkler.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan discovers the people who raised him are not his parents, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets.

programme.title: A Friend of the Family
programme.desc: Allison was unsettled by David's creepy attentions but she was the only one to suspect him of being a monster.

programme.title: Grace Is Gone
programme.desc: After learning that his wife has been killed in Iraq, a man takes his two daughters on a roadtrip to Florida.

programme.title: Major Movie Star
programme.desc: Movie star Megan Valentine loses everything when her sleazy boyfriend embezzles all her wealth.

programme.title: The Joker
programme.desc: In this creepy and twisted thriller, a young detective is caught in a horrifically sadistic game of cat-and-mouse when he is kidnapped and tormented by a masked, sex-crazed, serial killer. With a deadly race against time, he only has one method to save himself and a young girl. Starring Ron Perlman (Hellboy) and Halston Sage (Bad Neighbours) this clever, nail-biting nightmare is not to be missed!

programme.title: Masters of Love
programme.desc: A funny, moving look at the complications of modern love, starring Edinburgh Festival Best Newcomer Ciarˆn Dowd (Drunk History). A group of friends are at different stages in their relationships and none of them are convinced about what they're doing: Emmy and Samantha are getting married, Josh and Jenifer are breaking up and Niall is sleeping around but can any of them hold down a relationship?

programme.title: Class Rank
programme.desc: From the director of Glee, presenting a coming-of-age drama, in the vein of Easy A and Legally Blonde. Starring Olivia Holt (Cloak & Dagger), Skyler Gisondon (Booksmart), Bruce Dern (The Senator). Two high school outsiders join forces to overtake the local school board. Guided by their families, they enter the perilous world of politics and learn a thing or two about love.

programme.title: Dragon Blade
programme.desc: Inspired by true historical events, this epic action thriller stars martial arts legend Jackie Chan, John Cusack and Adrian Brody. When corrupt Roman leader Tiberius arrives with a giant army to claim the Silk Road, Huo An (Chan), teams up his army with an mysterious elite Legion, led by General Lucius (Cusack), to protect his country. A tale of courage, friendship and honour.
A desperate man takes part in an underworld game of Russian roulette in which gamblers place bets on who will survive. Starring Jason Statham, Ray Winstone and Mickey Rourke (2010)

programme.title: Hidden Intentions
programme.desc: A woman suspects that something is off about the sudden appearance of her aunt. Starring Ashlynn Yennie (2018)

programme.title: A Focus To Kill
programme.desc: A woman is hired by her ex-boyfriend to manage his fortune. After an affair, she is forced to confront the fact that he may not be the man he once was. Starring Presciliana Esparolini (2018)

programme.title: Deadly BandB
programme.desc: A woman opens her dream bed-and-breakfast in a recently restored home, but the arrival of a dangerous guest quickly disturbs the peace. Stars Angie Patterson Muto and Chad Michael Collins (2018)

programme.title: Seasoned With Love
programme.desc: Winona's dream of becoming a TV chef is shattered when car breaks down, she seeks refuge in Adam's Inn. In exchange for fixing her car, she will cater for the town's food festival. (2020)

programme.title: A Slice of Chicago Romance
programme.desc: Riley and Sarah are from rival family-run pizza restaurants. But their differences are forgotten when a new pizza chain opens in town. Could love be in the air? Stars Megan Elizabeth Barker. (2021)

programme.title: One Of A Kind Love
programme.desc: Kyra's dream of becoming a jeweller might come to fruition. Little does she know someone has manifested a life for her too. (2020)

programme.title: The Birthday Wish
programme.desc: Gwen is turning 30 and is expecting her boyfriend to propose. But when the proposal does not materialise, she makes a birthday wish to take a glimpse into her future. Is it what she envisaged? (2017)

programme.title: Our Take on Love
programme.desc: Designer Isabella and filmmaker Blake are both hired to work at the Godfrey Manor Gala. Will the romantic location and the love stories they uncover change their perception of love for the better?

programme.title: The Expatriate
programme.desc: When former CIA agent Ben Logan (Aaron Eckhart - The Dark Knight, Battle: Los Angeles) finds himself suddenly targeted for termination by the Agency, he is propelled into a frenzied, action-packed race against the clock for his life, with the only person left who wants or needs him alive: the 15 year-old daughter he barely knows. Also starring Olga Kurylenko (Quantum of Solace), The Expatriate is a stylish, cleverly plotted, non-stop espionage thriller that weighs an international conspiracy against personal honour and the bonds of family.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students. But gaining entrance to this utopia is only half the battle. Now they must compete with a group of the nation's most elite, tech-savvy geniuses to prove that necessity really is the mother of re-invention.

programme.title: 3 Generations
programme.desc: 3 GENERATIONS tells the stirring and touching story of three generations of a family living under one roof in New York as they must deal with the life-changing transformation by one that ultimately affects them all. Ray (Elle Fanning) is a teenager who knows he's a boy, even though he was assigned female at birth. Ray has already been living as a boy for years, but is now ready to start hormone replacement therapy. His single mother, Maggie (Naomi Watts), must track down Ray's biological father (Tate Donovan) to get his legal consent to allow Ray's transition.

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: Harrison Ford and Josh Hartnett star as unconventional homicide detectives in this gritty action-comedy from Ron Shelton, writer and director of Bull Durham and White Men Can't Jump. Joe Gavilan (Ford) is the seasoned veteran charged with showing K.C. Calden (Hartnett) the ropes, while investigating the gangland-style murder of a rap group.

programme.title: Residen Evil: Retribution
programme.desc: Alice fights alongside a resistance movement to regain her freedom from an Umbrella Corporation testing facility. A sequel to Resident Evil: Afterlife 3D.

programme.title: Blue Thunder
programme.desc: A tough but straight-arrow cop battles a group of military and government elitists who have developed an extraordinary helicopter into the ultimate weapon.

programme.title: White Water Summer
programme.desc: A group of city boys go on a camping trip with a counselor whose enthusiasm borders on the psychotic.

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A cop of the future, an evil genius and a murderous robotic force in a deadly chase of runaway terror.

programme.title: Vibes (1988)
programme.desc: A pair of mismatched psychics are thrown together on a mysterious mission in South America.

programme.title: St. Elmo's Fire
programme.desc: Featuring a fine ensemble cast including Demi Moore, Rob Lowe, Emilio Estevez and Andrew McCarthy, ST. ELMO'S FIRE follows the adventures of a group of friends in the years after their graduation from Georgetown University.

programme.title: Sheena
programme.desc: Exotic Tanya Roberts stars as Sheena, a comic book legend that comes to life. As a child, she was lost in the African jungle and adopted by the Zambouli tribe. She rules over the untamed wilds of Africa, until outsiders challenge her domain in this fun-filled action-adventure.

programme.title: Chances Are
programme.desc: A reincarnated soul (Robert Downey, Jr.) falls in love with his widow (Cybill Shepherd) 25 years after his death.

programme.title: Saving Silverman
programme.desc: Two friends try anything to keep their buddy and bandmate from marrying the wrong woman.

programme.title: Fighting Demons
programme.desc: Ex-boxer and former alcoholic, Vian, just got out of prison after serving time for a fatal accident and is desperate for a fresh start. He moves in with his sister Bethley and her young son, Jimmy, with the understanding that he will not drink at all. When Vian meets and begins dating the beautiful, successful Jolene, for the first time he knows love and commitment through his family and his new relationship. However, when an unfortunate accident jeopardizes the new life Vian has created, he must decide if he will revert back to the thug he once was or fight for the people he's grown to love.

programme.title: Where hands touch
programme.desc: In 1944, a 15-year-old girl, daughter of a white German mother and a black African father, meets a member of the Hitler Youth. They become bound by the realization of the horrors being committed around them.

programme.title: The Pursuit Of Happiness
programme.desc: An alienated social drop-out accidentally runs over a woman in a rain storm. Though he can prove it was an accident, he refuses to cooperate with "the establishment," and is sentenced to a year in prison. With only a week left to his sentence, he gets involved in a knifing and manages to escape. He looks up his old girlfriend and the two fly off to Canada.

programme.title: A Birder's Guide to Everything
programme.desc: Sideways meets stand by me in this endearing story of friendhip, family & a place in bird watching history books. On the eve of his widower father's second wedding, fifteen-year-old birding fanatic David Portnoy (Kodi Smit-McPhee) thinks that he's made the discovery of a lifetime, the extinct Labrador duck! Now he and the two other stalwart members of the local Young Birders Society, joined by their headstrong photographer classmate Ellen (Katie Chang), take off on an epic road trip in search of the rare bird and elusive answers to teenage questions large and small.

programme.title: The Tracker
programme.desc: Ten years ago, Aiden Hakansson's wife and daughter were kidnapped and killed in Italy during an exchange of prisoners gone wrong. Since then, Aiden has been living in the USA, isolated from the world, woken every night by nightmares and memories. He has lost all hope, when he receives a call from Italy someone asks to meet him to supply decisive information on the killing. Aiden doesn't hesitate: he leaves immediately for Italy, Taranto, driven only by the thought of revenge.

programme.title: Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: During some extensive renovations on an eight-storey office building, a major gas leak leads to a terrible explosion, trapping the injured staff in a fiery maze. Can the brave firefighters provide a safe exit from this deadly inferno?

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: Paul Walker plays Nolan Hayes, the father of a child born prematurely in New Orleans just before the onset of Hurricane Katrina. With his wife having died in childbirth, Nolan is plunged, alone, into a desperate fight to save his newborn baby's life as the city crumbles around him...

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The science fiction thriller leaps into a new realm with JUMPER, which begins the epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine. From New York to Tokyo, from the ruins of Rome to the heart of the Saharan Desert, anywhere is possible for David Rice (HAYDEN CHRISTENSEN), until he begins to see that his freedom is not total, that he's not alone... but part of an ongoing, global war that threatens the very survival of his rare and extraordinary kind.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: In this live action movie-length version of the famous four, The Evil Shredder has returned to cause more mayhem and kidnaps the rat Ninja Master. But the Turtles have been armed with Professor Perry's Anti Mutant antidote and, with the help of a journalist, embark on an adventure to save the Ninja Master.

programme.title: Hummingbirds: Jewelled Messengers
programme.desc: David Attenborough takes us into the remarkable lives of hummingbirds via stunning slow motion photography. Everything about these tiny birds is superb and extreme. They have the highest metabolism, fastest heart beat and most rapid wing beat in the avian world.

programme.title: Lions Rule
programme.desc: On the African plains lions rule. They're not the biggest or fastest animals around, but stealth, teamwork and the strength of the pride means they almost always come out on top.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: What seems calm and tranquil may not necessarily be so. Under the tranquility there maybe a vibrant dynamic world and above water there maybe dangers which are lurking at very corner.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Snow Leopard is the one of the most elusive big cats in the world. This episode details how the wildlife guards and the wildlife department has set up conservation and scientific plans to protect and indeed to enumerate and increase it's population

programme.title: Monkey Mayhem
programme.desc: Monkeys: loveable, aggressive, diverse and full of mischief. Our distant cousins have much in common with us. They're intelligent, cooperative and have complex relationships. They're some of the most evolutionary successful species on the planet, successful across the globe from Japanese snow monkeys to African baboons. Swinging through our family tree quickly reveals the diversity of our monkey relatives. They come in all shapes and sizes, and are certainly not as different from us as we might think.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson shares an extraordinary bond with Africa's most fearsome predators. Together with them, he has experienced some real adventures. However, transporting 27 lions and 14 hyenas to a new home presents a different challenge.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Snow Leopard is the one of the most elusive big cats in the world. This episode details how the wildlife guards and the wildlife department has set up conservation and scientific plans to protect and indeed to enumerate and increase it's population

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Rhino horn is very expensive in the illegal market and the poachers know it. Kaziranga has the only concentrated population of the one horned Rhino in the world. And poachers are attracted to Kaziranga like ants are to sugar.

programme.title: Ocean's Africa
programme.desc: In 'Dinosaurs Of The Deep' we accompany a team of WildOceans' scientists uncovering the mysteries behind the deep oceans. With only 32 individuals known to exist off the coast of South Africa, central to the storytelling will be the quest to discover the 33rd coelacanth.

programme.title: The Incredible Five
programme.desc: Cheetahs are the high-speed hunters of the Savannah. Few attempt to take on larger prey than gazelles or smallish antelopes. But on occasion, the predatory cats reveal their surprisingly different side. In the Northern Serengeti, a group of male cheetahs emerges and turns all we know about them upside down. Males are usually loners or live in small groups, but here we have five tomcats hunting together as one. It is actually, the largest alliance of the animals ever seen! This film has many stories to tell about the sleek hunters.

programme.title: Zoo Babies: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: We find out about the sweetest and most poignant animal baby stories. Whether on land, under water or in the sky - all of the babies in this series will conquer the hearts of all those watching. We accompany the adventures of the animal babies - lovingly cared for and brought up by their keepers. In the most gripping and informative way, both young and old will discover everything there is to know about Hamburg Zoo's toddlers.

programme.title: Raising Wildlife
programme.desc: An hour's drive from Johannesburg Warren is raising three cheetah cubs at the Lion and Cheetah Sanctuary. They are an endangered species – not only in South Africa but around the world. Warren is taking the three orphaned siblings for walks on a daily basis to give them the opportunity to experience being outside their enclosure. This is part of the preparation for their return to the wild. Convincing them to leave the enclosure is easy, trying to get them back in is a difficult task to undertake. In the South African Limpopo province, we meet clinic manager Nikita at the Moholoholo Animal Rehabilitation Centre. She's taking care of several different animals all of whom got their own sad story. One of them is a female honey badger who recently lost her cub post-partum. She is mothering a chain as a substitute for her cub so Nikita is trying to help her getting through this difficult phase. She is also monitoring vultures who have fallen victim to poisoning. And she introduces Havana to us - a juvenile caracal who was found abandoned in a hotel. She has obviously been raised by humans as she was found clinging to a milk bottle. In our highlight story we travel to Crag's View Wild Care Centre in Port Edwards along the south coast of Kwa-Zulu Natal. Here we meet Craig and a partially blind blue duiker. Craig didn't have high hopes for the antelope to survive, as she has been attacked by a large cat. But thanks to the passionate caretaker the bubbly animal is doing great today.

programme.title: Raising Wildlife
programme.sub-title: Wild Dog, Owls, Bat Eared Foxes
programme.desc: At the Loebis Predator Park in Bela-Bella, a town in the South African Limpopo region, caretaker Annel is looking after orphaned animal babys. Part of her gang of little rascals are a wild dog puppy and a porcupine – both two months old – who have an unlikely friendship and team up against a greedy little predator who likes to steel their food – a same-aged lion cub. But in the end, all of them get along very well – even with the cheeky little mongooses. The highlight of our visit there is the birth of two new members of this unusual family. We also meet Deidre Joubert at the Wild and Free Wildlife Rehabilitation Centre in Mpumalanga who takes care of young barn owls and prepares a bunch of them for their return to the wild. The first step of this process is a release into a bigger enclosure, in which they will stay for seven days, before they finally get back to their natural environment. In our highlight story, we meet sister and brother team Chriszanne and Nicol Burger at the Felidae Wildlife Centre just outside a town called Kimberley in the South African province of Northern Cape. Their focus is on rescued wild cats of all sizes but they also take care for a family of bat-eared foxes – a very intelligent and brash species.

programme.title: Raising Wildlife
programme.desc: In the Wokutakula Wildlife Rescue Centre located in Brits, 85 kilometres north of Johannesburg animal caretaker Juan is looking after a partially blind juvenile Tiger called Felix. Juan rescued the exotic animal just moments before it was going to be traded overseas. He tried to treat the tiger's eye condition but so far, his efforts were unsuccessful. There is no hope for Felix to be returned to the wild, but she has adapted to her new life – thanks to other Tigers, who accompany her and Juan, who sheperds her as good as he can. In the province of Limpopo, we meet Laita at the Moholoholo Animal Rehabilitation Centre. She takes care of two precious juveniles: a Black Leopard and a Serval. The Black Leopard was raised by humans and didn't get the right nutrition, so he was stunted in growth. Therefore, it wouldn't have any chance to survive in the wild. Laita oversees his rehabilitation and the young animal makes great strides. The Serval is the only survivor of four abandoned kittens that got rescued. He also comes along very well and is developing essential skills. For our highlight story we travel to the Mankwe Wildlife Reserve, where Dougal and Lynn are monitoring young and juvenile animals. Spotting giraffes and rhinos isn't easy but it's a rewarding task.

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies: Wildlife Nannies: Baboon Mother
programme.desc: Baboon Mother: In South Africa, 76-yr. old Rita Miljo is raising the tiny baboon baby Rosie as if it were her own. As Rosie grows bigger and stronger, Rita takes her to a “baboon kindergarten”, where she is to form a new troop with others. We also witness Rita and her team releasing a troop of grown baboons into the wild. Wombat Baby Mater: Shaun Douglas of “Something Wild Wildlife Sanctuary” in Tasmania has become a surrogate “mom” to the tiny wombat Mater. As little wombats cling to their mothers for many months in their early lives, Shaun takes Mater with him wherever he goes – even to the shower and to bed!

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.sub-title: Similarity in Difference: From Generation to Generation
programme.desc: The journey leads from the Norwegian Vesterålen to Chad, the Aeolian Islands and the Polish Giant Mountains. As different as the landscapes and cultures may be, all people are united in their love for their children and their desire to give something to tomorrow's generation.

programme.title: Magical Moors
programme.desc: Wide open heaths, windswept and barren in winter, are transformed into wonderful carpets of white, fluffy cotton grass in summer. Large bears and wolves roam alongside delicately fluttering butterflies, the bubbling calls of black grouse and the enchanting trills of the great snipe. Moors, bogs and wetlands can be found all over in Europe. Everyone has at least heard about this habitat but most know little about it. It is an ancient yet largely unknown set of landscapes that is full of enchanting surprises. On a warm spring day, poisonous adders emerge from hiding to perform their impressive mating dance. As dusk falls, snipe gather on traditional leks, leaping and singing to impress the opposite sex. And deep down in the boggy marshes, glittering emeralds of sticky dew lure insects into the deadly arms of meat-eating plants. Magical Moors captures the quiet beauty of a spectacular landscape, and its often elusive wildlife, in stunning detail.
